name: Stirling PDF
description: Merge, split, rotate, and convert PDFs with ease
compose:
name: slashnode-stirling-pdf
services:
  app:
    image: stirlingtools/stirling-pdf:2.13.2
    container_name: stirling-pdf
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DOCKER_ENABLE_SECURITY: 'false'
      INSTALL_BOOK_AND_ADVANCED_HTML_OPS: 'true'
      LANGS: ALL
      SECURITY_ENABLELOGIN: 'false'
    volumes:
      - app_data-tessdata:/usr/share/tessdata
      - app_data-configs:/configs
      - app_data-logs:/logs
      - app_data-pipeline:/pipeline
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:27829:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-tessdata:
    name: slashnode-stirling-pdf_app_data-tessdata
  app_data-configs:
    name: slashnode-stirling-pdf_app_data-configs
  app_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-stirling-pdf_app_data-logs
  app_data-pipeline:
    name: slashnode-stirling-pdf_app_data-pipeline
